message:
feat(tls): add server-side TLS acceptor

Add TLS server support with TlsAcceptor:
- src/tls/acceptor.rs: TlsAcceptor and TlsAcceptorBuilder
- Server-side TLS connection acceptance
- Certificate chain and private key configuration
- ALPN protocol negotiation support

Runtime improvements:
- scope.rs: Scope management updates
- plan/mod.rs: Plan module refinements
- task_handle.rs: Task handle improvements

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
